TypeSignature.Value: .class public auto ansi abstract beforefieldinit FilterTranslatorBase extends System.Object

Docs.summary: Base class for filter translators used by vector data connectors. Provides common functionality for preprocessing filter expressions and matching common patterns. This is an internal support type meant for use by connectors only and not by applications.

MemberSignature.Value: protected FilterTranslatorBase ();

Docs.summary: The collection model for the current translation operation.

MemberSignature.Value: protected System.Linq.Expressions.Expression PreprocessFilter (System.Linq.Expressions.LambdaExpression lambdaExpression, Microsoft.Extensions.VectorData.ProviderServices.CollectionModel model, Microsoft.Extensions.VectorData.ProviderServices.Filter.FilterPreprocessingOptions options);

.method familyhidebysig instance class System.Linq.Expressions.Expression PreprocessFilter(class System.Linq.Expressions.LambdaExpression lambdaExpression, class Microsoft.Extensions.VectorData.ProviderServices.CollectionModel model, class Microsoft.Extensions.VectorData.ProviderServices.Filter.FilterPreprocessingOptions options) cil managed

Docs.param: The filter lambda expression to preprocess.
The collection model containing property information.
Docs.summary: Preprocesses the filter expression before translation. Sets and , runs the preprocessing visitor, and returns the preprocessed expression.
Docs.returns: The preprocessed expression ready for translation.

Docs.summary: The parameter expression representing the record in the filter lambda.

Docs.param: When successful, the property model that was bound.
Docs.summary: Tries to bind an expression to a property in the collection model.
Docs.returns: if the expression was successfully bound to a property; otherwise, .

Docs.param: The method call expression to match.
When successful, the source collection expression.
When successful, the item expression being searched for.
Docs.summary: Tries to match a Contains method call expression and extract the source collection and item expressions.
Docs.returns: if the expression is a recognized Contains pattern; otherwise, .

MemberSignature.Value: protected static bool TryUnwrapSpanImplicitCast (System.Linq.Expressions.Expression expression, out System.Linq.Expressions.Expression? result);

Docs.summary: Tries to unwrap an implicit cast to Span or ReadOnlySpan that may be present in expressions when C# 14's first-class span support causes MemoryExtensions methods to be resolved.
Docs.returns: if a span implicit cast was unwrapped; otherwise, .
